item.title: Semi Truck Under Power Lines
item.description: A semi truck becomes stranded beneath overhead power lines, creating a delicate recovery that demands careful coordination and safety precautions.

media:content.media:title: Semi Truck Under Power Lines
media:content.media:description: A semi truck becomes stranded beneath overhead power lines, creating a delicate recovery that demands careful coordination and safety precautions.

item.title: Mobile Parking Lot High Centered in a Parking Lot
item.description: A large vehicle becomes high-centered in a parking lot, requiring careful towing techniques to free it without causing additional damage.

media:content.media:title: Mobile Parking Lot High Centered in a Parking Lot
media:content.media:description: A large vehicle becomes high-centered in a parking lot, requiring careful towing techniques to free it without causing additional damage.

item.title: Log Truck Rolls on Busy Road - Driver Is OK
item.description: A loaded log truck overturns on a busy roadway, prompting a complex recovery operation while the driver safely escapes without serious injury.

media:content.media:title: Log Truck Rolls on Busy Road - Driver Is OK
media:content.media:description: A loaded log truck overturns on a busy roadway, prompting a complex recovery operation while the driver safely escapes without serious injury.

item.title: Truck Recovery and DEF System Support
item.description: A disabled truck receives recovery assistance along with support for a DEF system issue to help get it safely back on the road.

media:content.media:title: Truck Recovery and DEF System Support
media:content.media:description: A disabled truck receives recovery assistance along with support for a DEF system issue to help get it safely back on the road.

item.title: School Bus Flips in Flood Recovery
item.description: Recovery crews respond after a school bus overturns during flooding, carefully recovering the vehicle under difficult conditions.

media:content.media:title: School Bus Flips in Flood Recovery
media:content.media:description: Recovery crews respond after a school bus overturns during flooding, carefully recovering the vehicle under difficult conditions.

item.title: Silly Toyota Tundra Recovery Operation
item.description: A Toyota Tundra finds itself in an unusual situation, leading to a recovery that requires experience, teamwork, and the right equipment.

media:content.media:title: Silly Toyota Tundra Recovery Operation
media:content.media:description: A Toyota Tundra finds itself in an unusual situation, leading to a recovery that requires experience, teamwork, and the right equipment.

item.title: Two Tow Trucks at a Busy Intersection
item.description: Two tow trucks work together at a busy intersection to safely recover disabled vehicles while keeping traffic moving.

media:content.media:title: Two Tow Trucks at a Busy Intersection
media:content.media:description: Two tow trucks work together at a busy intersection to safely recover disabled vehicles while keeping traffic moving.

item.title: Code 3 We Got to Roll!
item.description: The crew responds to an urgent recovery call, racing to the scene and preparing for another demanding towing operation.

media:content.media:title: Code 3 We Got to Roll!
media:content.media:description: The crew responds to an urgent recovery call, racing to the scene and preparing for another demanding towing operation.

item.title: Rotator vs. Raw Cummins
item.description: A powerful rotator tow truck takes on a tough recovery involving a Cummins-powered vehicle, putting heavy-duty equipment and operator skill to the test

media:content.media:title: Rotator vs. Raw Cummins
media:content.media:description: A powerful rotator tow truck takes on a tough recovery involving a Cummins-powered vehicle, putting heavy-duty equipment and operator skill to the test

item.title: Excavator Trapped Between Power Lines and a Gas Line
item.description: A challenging recovery unfolds as an excavator becomes trapped between overhead power lines and a nearby gas line, requiring careful planning and precise towing operations

media:content.media:title: Excavator Trapped Between Power Lines and a Gas Line
media:content.media:description: A challenging recovery unfolds as an excavator becomes trapped between overhead power lines and a nearby gas line, requiring careful planning and precise towing operations

item.title: D6 Dozer Stuck Deep, Rescue On!
item.description: A D6 dozer is stuck deep, and the recovery operation is underway. The focus is on the equipment, setup, and field rescue process used to get the machine moving again. What would you use first?

media:content.media:title: D6 Dozer Stuck Deep, Rescue On!
media:content.media:description: A D6 dozer is stuck deep, and the recovery operation is underway. The focus is on the equipment, setup, and field rescue process used to get the machine moving again. What would you use first?

item.title: Cool Lift or Too Hot to Handle?
item.description: A heavy recovery lift in the field, showing the equipment and process used to handle a challenging vehicle recovery. What would you call this kind of operation?

media:content.media:title: Cool Lift or Too Hot to Handle?
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery lift in the field, showing the equipment and process used to handle a challenging vehicle recovery. What would you call this kind of operation?

item.title: Barrel Rolling Titan
item.description: A heavy recovery operation featuring a barrel rolling Titan, with a focus on the equipment and process used to manage the vehicle in the field. What would you watch next?

media:content.media:title: Barrel Rolling Titan
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery operation featuring a barrel rolling Titan, with a focus on the equipment and process used to manage the vehicle in the field. What would you watch next?

item.title: Recovering a Heavily Damaged Truck and Trailer
item.description: A heavy recovery operation focused on a damaged truck and trailer, showing the towing and rescue process used to move the rig safely. What equipment would you use for a job like this?

media:content.media:title: Recovering a Heavily Damaged Truck and Trailer
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery operation focused on a damaged truck and trailer, showing the towing and rescue process used to move the rig safely. What equipment would you use for a job like this?

item.title: The One Way Road to a Shifted Load
item.description: A heavy recovery operation focused on a shifted load and the steps needed to stabilize and move it safely. The work highlights towing equipment, recovery setup, and real-world roadside handling.

media:content.media:title: The One Way Road to a Shifted Load
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery operation focused on a shifted load and the steps needed to stabilize and move it safely. The work highlights towing equipment, recovery setup, and real-world roadside handling.

item.title: Semi Truck Recovery After a Pothole Collapse
item.description: Recovery crews respond after a semi truck becomes trapped following a roadway collapse, using specialized equipment and careful planning to complete the difficult recovery.

media:content.media:title: Semi Truck Recovery After a Pothole Collapse
media:content.media:description: Recovery crews respond after a semi truck becomes trapped following a roadway collapse, using specialized equipment and careful planning to complete the difficult recovery.
